Getting started is easy

step 1

Enter your website

Our AI learns everything about your business to produce the highest quality answers.

1
2
step 2

Customize your voice

Choose from natural-sounding voices and set your business tone. Connect any CRM software you want.

step 3

Connect your tools

Sync your calendar, CRM, and booking systems. Smart routing with zero double-bookings.

3
4
step 4

Go live instantly

Start answering calls 24/7 within minutes. Monitor conversations in real-time and refine as you grow.

Start answering calls Start free effortlessly

What Does Your AI
Receptionist Do?

Your AI handles day-to-day reception tasks, making life easier for you and your team

We help you never miss a call again

Every call answered 24/7. Appointments booked directly into your calendar. Returning customers greeted by name.

Jessica

Hey, I'd like to book a haircut for next Thursday if that's possible?

Yeah, 2pm would be perfect actually.

Oh, and could I also get a colour done at the same time?

A balayage would be great.

Perfect, thanks so much! See you Thursday.

Entry AI

Hi Jessica! Thanks for calling. Thursday has availability at 10am or 2pm — which works better for you?

Perfect. I've pencilled you in for 2pm with Sarah.

Of course! Sarah does colour as well. Were you thinking highlights, balayage, or a full colour?

Great choice. I've updated your booking — haircut and balayage, Thursday at 2pm. You'll get a confirmation SMS shortly.

See you then, Jessica! Have a lovely day.

We keep everything in one place

Calls, emails, chats, and enquiries in a single inbox. AI summaries and smart drafts so you stay on top of it all.

We connect to the tools you already use

Calendar, CRM, and booking systems — all synced. Smart routing, zero double-bookings.

Entry is built to keep your data safe

Client data stays protected

Your customers' personal details, phone numbers, and booking info are encrypted and stored securely. Only your team can access them.

Call recordings are yours alone

Every call transcript and summary is private to your business. We never share, sell, or use your conversations for anything.

Your business knowledge stays private

The FAQs, services, and pricing you teach Entry are never used to train AI models or shared with anyone outside your account.

Features Pricing Demo About Contact

Ready to never miss a call again?

Set up your AI receptionist in under 2 minutes. No credit card required.
